description.en: Crisp cucumbers lightly smashed and tossed in a tangy garlic sauce.
description.zh: 黃瓜輕拍，配蒜泥淋汁。

description.en: Fresh spinach quickly blanched and dressed with aged vinegar.
description.zh: 菠菜汆水，老醋涼拌。

description.en: Shredded chicken mixed with a light, spicy dressing.
description.zh: 雞絲拌微辣口水汁。

description.en: Thinly sliced beef shank paired with dried lettuce, dressed in a chili sauce.
description.zh: 牛展薄切，貢菜辣油拌。

description.en: Green peppers pan-fried until blistered, then seasoned with soy sauce and vinegar.
description.zh: 青椒乾煸虎皮，醬醋調味。

description.en: Lettuce stems, spinach, water spinach blanched and dressed with light garlic sauce.
description.zh: 萵筍、菠菜、空心菜汆熟，淋蒜汁。

description.en: Beef ribs slowly braised with tomatoes, carrots, white radish, and dried bamboo shoots in a soy sauce mixture.
description.zh: 牛肋條與番茄、紅蘿蔔、白蘿蔔、筍乾醬燒。

description.en: Spare ribs braised with potatoes, taro, and fresh bamboo shoots in a savory sauce.
description.zh: 排骨配土豆、芋頭、鮮筍紅燒。

description.en: Lamb belly stewed in a spicy bean paste sauce.
description.zh: 羊腩以辣豆瓣慢煲。

description.en: Chicken stewed with assorted mushrooms and glass noodles.
description.zh: 土雞、雜菇與粉條同燉。

description.en: Stir-fried glass noodles with minced pork in a spicy sauce.
description.zh: 粉絲與肉末微辣同炒。

description.en: Stir-fried shredded pork with green peppers in a light soy sauce.
description.zh: 青椒肉絲清炒，淡醬油調味。

description.en: Pork stir-fried with wood ear mushrooms and bamboo shoots in a spicy garlic sauce.
description.zh: 肉絲、木耳、筍絲魚香味炒。

description.en: Green beans stir-fried with minced pork and seasoned with garlic.
description.zh: 四季豆與肉末蒜香煸炒。

description.en: Deep-fried chicken pieces tossed with dried chilies and Sichuan peppercorns.
description.zh: 雞塊乾辣椒、花椒爆炒。

description.en: Stir-fried celery with smoked tofu and a hint of chili.
description.zh: 芹菜與豆乾微辣同炒。

description.en: Eggs stir-fried with leeks, offering a fresh and slightly pungent taste.
description.zh: 雞蛋與韭黃同炒，清香微嗆。

description.en: Soft scrambled eggs cooked with fresh tomatoes, creating a sweet and savory blend.
description.zh: 番茄炒蛋，鹹甜交融。

description.en: Shrimp cooked with smooth scrambled eggs, seasoned lightly.
description.zh: 蝦仁滑蛋，調味清淡。

description.en: Large prawns quickly stir-fried in hot oil with seasonings, resulting in a crispy texture.
description.zh: 大蝦旺火油爆，外脆內嫩。

description.en: Pork ribs or beef tenderloin steamed with rice flour and spices.
description.zh: 排骨或牛柳裹米粉同蒸。

description.en: Silky smooth egg custard, steamed with dried shrimp.
description.zh: 蛋液加蝦皮蒸至嫩滑。

description.en: Minced pork and poached egg steamed together.
description.zh: 肉末與半熟蛋同蒸。

dishName.en: Steamed Ash Gourd with Dried Scallops

description.en: Sliced ash gourd and dried scallops steamed together.
description.zh: 冬瓜片配瑤柱清蒸。

description.en: Tofu steamed with minced pork on top.
description.zh: 豆腐覆肉末上鍋蒸。

description.en: Chicken and shiitake mushrooms steamed to create a tender and aromatic dish.
description.zh: 雞肉與香菇蒸至香嫩。

description.en: Enoki mushroom steamed with baby cabbage and vermicelli, topped with a garlic sauce.
description.zh: 金針菇配娃娃菜、粉絲，蒜蓉淋汁蒸。

description.en: Eggplant steamed and dressed with a homemade spicy chili oil sauce.
description.zh: 茄子蒸熟，淋自家辣油。

description.en: Free-range chicken and red dates simmered.
description.zh: 走地老雞與紅棗慢燉。

description.en: Lamb leg meat simmered with spices.
description.zh: 羊腿肉與香料慢燉。

description.en: Sweet osmanthus fish, crucian carp, or perch with tofu and millet simmered together.
description.zh: 桂花魚、鯽魚或鱸魚配豆腐、小米同燉。

description.en: Seasonal vegetables and pork meatballs in broth.
description.zh: 時蔬與豬肉丸清湯。

description.en: Oxtail stewed with spices.
description.zh: 牛尾與香料清燉。

dishName.en: Lotus Root and Pork Bone Soup

description.en: Lotus root and pork bones simmered.
description.zh: 蓮藕與筒骨慢燉。

description.en: Tomatoes, seaweed, dried shrimp, and eggs combined.
description.zh: 番茄、紫菜、蝦皮、雞蛋滾湯。

description.en: Watercress and omelette in broth.
description.zh: 潺菜與煎蛋同煮成湯。

description.en: Kimchi, tofu, and bean sprouts in a spicy broth.
description.zh: 泡菜、豆腐、豆芽辣湯。

description.en: Shredded daikon and cabbage tossed with light vinegar and chili oil.
description.zh: 蘿蔔絲與包菜，米醋紅油輕拌。

description.en: Tender pork slices poached in chili-bean broth, finished with sizzling oil.
description.zh: 肉片郫縣豆瓣熬汁，淋熱油激香。

description.en: Spare ribs steamed under a blanket of fried garlic.
description.zh: 排骨鋪滿蒜蓉，原汁清蒸。

description.en: Sweet luffa steamed atop glass noodles with garlic and dried shrimp.
description.zh: 絲瓜覆於粉絲之上，蒜頭蝦米同蒸。

description.en: Marinated chicken or fish brought to the table sizzling in a hot clay pot.
description.zh: 雞或魚以陶煲猛火啫啫，連煲上桌。

dishName.en: Five-Finger Peach Root Chicken Clay Pot

description.en: Free-range chicken simmered in a clay pot with five-finger peach root — a Cantonese tonic broth, faintly sweet with coconut aroma.
description.zh: 走地雞與五指毛桃同煲，廣式滋補，淡淡椰香。

description.en: Beef, tomato, cabbage and root vegetables slow-simmered into a hearty broth.
description.zh: 牛肉、番茄、椰菜與根莖菜慢燉成濃湯。

description.en: Pork ribs and sweet green peppers simmered into a clear, peppery broth.
description.zh: 排骨與青椒清燉，湯色澄淨微辛。

description.en: Free-range chicken simmered with shiitake, oyster and tea-tree mushrooms.
description.zh: 走地雞配香菇、平菇、茶樹菇慢燉。

description.en: Sweet luffa and house-made fish tofu in a clear broth.
description.zh: 絲瓜與自製魚腐，清湯滾煮。

description.en: Salmon collar and tofu in a delicate white miso broth.
description.zh: 三文魚頸與豆腐，白味噌清湯。

description.en: Rice noodles in coconut-spice broth, with prawns, tofu puffs and laksa leaf.
description.zh: 米麵浸椰香辣湯，配蝦、豆卜、叻沙葉。

description.en: Clay-pot rice cooked with taro, dried shrimp and a drizzle of lard.
description.zh: 煲仔飯配芋頭、蝦米，淋少許豬油。

description.en: Spring vegetables, bamboo shoot and salted pork folded through clay-pot rice.
description.zh: 春蔬、嫩筍與鹹豬肉拌入煲仔飯。

description.en: Day-aged rice tossed in the wok with whisked egg, scallion and a whisper of lard.
description.zh: 隔夜飯與蛋液同炒，蔥花、少許豬油提香。

description.en: Wok-fried rice with minced pork, chili and fresh Thai basil.
description.zh: 豬肉末、辣椒與九層塔同炒。

description.en: Tender velveted pork in a tomato broth thickened to a silky finish.
description.zh: 肉片上漿滑嫩，番茄湯打芡成羹。

description.en: Silken tofu pudding ladled over a Sichuan ragù of minced pork, peanuts and pickled mustard.
description.zh: 嫩豆花澆肉臊，配花生、芽菜，川式鹹鮮微辣。

description.en: Pork strips marinated with Sichuan pepper, battered in sweet-potato starch and fried golden.
description.zh: 豬肉條花椒醃製，紅薯粉漿炸至金黃酥脆。

description.en: Whole sea bass dry-braised in chili-bean sauce until the liquid clings to the fish.
description.zh: 整條鱸魚以豆瓣醬乾燒，收汁掛味。

description.en: Shell-on prawns flash-fried, tossed with toasted Sichuan pepper-salt, garlic and chili.
description.zh: 帶殼大蝦旺火爆炒，椒鹽、蒜蓉、辣椒拌香。

description.en: Yunnan porcini dry-fried over high heat with dried chili and garlic until edges crisp.
description.zh: 雲南牛肝菌猛火乾爆，配乾辣椒、蒜片，邊緣焦香。

description.en: Cauliflower florets dry-fried with cured pork belly, dried chili and garlic in a small iron pot.
description.zh: 花菜與臘肉、乾辣椒、蒜頭乾鍋慢煸。

description.en: Crisp-fried potato florets glazed with a bright sweet-and-sour vinegar sauce.
description.zh: 土豆切花炸酥，淋糖醋醬汁掛芡。

description.en: Lamb shoulder seared over high heat with toasted cumin, dried chili and scallion.
description.zh: 羊肩肉旺火快炒，孜然、乾辣椒、蔥段提香。

description.en: Velveted sea bass slices simmered with Sichuan pickled mustard greens in a sour-spicy broth.
description.zh: 鱸魚片上漿，與四川老酸菜同煮，湯酸辛開胃。

description.en: Hand-pulled noodles in a slow-braised soy-and-spice beef broth with tendon and brisket.
description.zh: 手拉麵浸紅燒牛肉湯，配牛腱與牛筋。

description.en: Tender eggplant braised with minced pork, garlic and chili-bean sauce, served sizzling.
description.zh: 茄子與豬肉末、蒜蓉、豆瓣醬同煲，連煲上桌。

description.en: Crisp seasonal vegetables tossed Guizhou-style with fermented chili, peanut and zhe'ergen.
description.zh: 時蔬涼拌，配糟辣椒、花生、折耳根，貴州風味。

description.en: Shanghai-style rice cooked with bok choy and slivers of cured pork, finished with lard.
description.zh: 青菜與臘肉粒同煮成飯，淋少許豬油。

description.en: Crisp chicken cutlet over rice, ladled with coconut-rich Malaysian curry.
description.zh: 炸雞排配白飯，淋椰香馬來咖喱。

description.en: Panko-crusted chicken katsu over rice with mellow Japanese curry sauce.
description.zh: 麵包糠炸雞排蓋飯，澆日式咖喱醬。

description.en: Chicken and silky onion simmered in dashi-soy, finished with soft-set egg over rice.
description.zh: 雞肉與洋蔥以柴魚醬油煮製，覆嫩蛋蓋飯。
